fields.name: Apiary Establishment & Management
fields.description: Site selection, design and installation of modern beehives (Langstroth, Top-bar), apiary layout planning, colony stocking, routine hive inspection, pest and disease control, and seasonal management.
benefits: Professional apiary setup reducing colony losses
Modern beehive technology for easier management
Expert guidance on site selection and hive placement

faq.question: How long does apiary setup take?
faq.answer: Full setup typically takes 2-4 weeks depending on site conditions, scale, and availability of materials.

faq.question: What type of beehives do you recommend?
faq.answer: We recommend Langstroth hives for commercial production and Top-bar hives for small-scale farmers.

faq.question: Do you provide ongoing support?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer follow-up visits and remote support as part of our service packages.

fields.seo_title: Apiary Establishment & Management Services | FeeVert Tanzania
fields.seo_description: Professional apiary establishment and management services in Tanzania. Site selection, modern beehive installation, colony management, and ongoing beekeeping support.

fields.name: Supply of Beekeeping Equipment & Inputs
fields.description: Supply of beehives, protective gear (bee suits, gloves, smokers), hive tools, bee colonies (nucleus colonies and queen bees), and honey harvesting equipment.

faq.question: Do you deliver equipment nationwide?
faq.answer: Yes, we deliver to all regions in Tanzania. Delivery time varies by location.

faq.question: What warranty do you offer?
faq.answer: We offer 6-12 month warranty on all equipment depending on the product type.

fields.seo_description: Quality beekeeping equipment and inputs supply in Tanzania. Beehives, protective gear, bee colonies, honey harvesting equipment, and more.

fields.name: Honey & Bee Products Processing
fields.description: Honey harvesting and extraction, processing, filtration, packaging, and production of value-added products (beeswax, propolis, royal jelly, bee venom). Quality control and certification support.
benefits: Increase product value through professional processing
Meet TBS and international quality standards

faq.question: Can you help with organic certification?
faq.answer: Yes, we guide you through the organic certification process and connect you with certifying bodies.

faq.question: What value-added products can be made?
faq.answer: Beeswax candles, propolis tinctures, royal jelly supplements, bee venom cosmetics, and more.

prerequisites: Processing space or willingness to set up
fields.seo_title: Honey Processing & Value Addition Services | FeeVert Tanzania
fields.seo_description: Professional honey and bee products processing consultancy. Extraction, filtration, packaging, quality control, and certification support in Tanzania.

fields.name: Beekeeping Training & Capacity Building
fields.description: Practical training for beginner and advanced beekeepers, farmer field schools, demonstration apiaries, modern beekeeping techniques, hive management, post-harvest handling, and value addition.

faq.question: Do you offer on-site training?
faq.answer: Yes, we conduct training at your location or at our demonstration apiaries.

faq.question: How long is the training?
faq.answer: Training ranges from 1-day workshops to 2-week intensive courses depending on your needs.

fields.seo_title: Beekeeping Training & Capacity Building | FeeVert Tanzania
fields.seo_description: Practical beekeeping training for beginners and advanced beekeepers in Tanzania. Farmer field schools, modern techniques, and post-harvest handling.

fields.name: Pollination Services
fields.description: Provision of managed bee colonies for crop pollination, pollination contracts with farmers and agribusinesses, monitoring and evaluation of pollination efficiency, and advisory services.

faq.question: Which crops benefit from bee pollination?
faq.answer: Sunflowers, avocados, watermelons, cucumbers, mangoes, coffee, and many other crops.

faq.question: How many hives do I need?
faq.answer: This depends on crop type and farm size. We assess and recommend optimal hive density.

prerequisites: Agreement on pesticide management during pollination
fields.seo_title: Bee Pollination Services for Crops | FeeVert Tanzania
fields.seo_description: Managed bee pollination services for crop farmers in Tanzania. Increase yields with professional pollination solutions for various crop types.

fields.name: Environmental Impact Assessment (EIA/ESIA)
fields.description: Screening and scoping of projects, full Environmental and Social Impact Assessments (ESIA), preparation of Environmental Impact Statements (EIS), stakeholder consultations, and Environmental and Social Management Plans (ESMPs).

faq.question: How long does an EIA take?
faq.answer: A full EIA typically takes 30-90 days depending on project complexity and regulatory requirements.

faq.question: Do you handle NEMC registration?
faq.answer: Yes, we guide clients through the entire NEMC registration and EIA approval process.

fields.seo_title: Environmental Impact Assessment (EIA) Services | FeeVert Tanzania
fields.seo_description: NEMC-compliant Environmental Impact Assessment (EIA/ESIA) services in Tanzania. Full project screening, assessments, and regulatory compliance support.

fields.name: Environmental Audits & Compliance Monitoring
fields.description: Environmental compliance audits, performance monitoring and reporting, legal compliance registers, post-EIA audit and follow-up studies, due diligence audits for investors and financiers.
benefits: Identify compliance gaps before regulatory inspections
Reduce risk of penalties and shutdowns

faq.question: How often should environmental audits be done?
faq.answer: We recommend annual audits, though regulatory requirements may vary by sector.

faq.question: Can you help fix compliance issues found?
faq.answer: Yes, we provide corrective action plans and can assist with implementation.

fields.seo_title: Environmental Audit & Compliance Monitoring | FeeVert Tanzania
fields.seo_description: Professional environmental audit and compliance monitoring services in Tanzania. Identify gaps, ensure regulatory compliance, and improve environmental performance.

fields.name: Pollution Control & Waste Management
fields.description: Solid waste management planning, hazardous waste management, waste minimization and circular economy solutions, air pollution control strategies, wastewater treatment and effluent management.
benefits: Improve public image and sustainability ratings

faq.question: Can you design a full waste management system?
faq.answer: Yes, we design comprehensive waste management systems tailored to your operations.

faq.question: Do you handle hazardous waste?
faq.answer: Yes, we provide hazardous waste assessment, handling procedures, and disposal guidance.

fields.seo_title: Pollution Control & Waste Management Services | FeeVert Tanzania
fields.seo_description: Expert pollution control and waste management consultancy in Tanzania. Solid waste, hazardous waste, wastewater treatment, and circular economy solutions.

fields.name: Climate Change & Sustainability Services
fields.description: Climate risk and vulnerability assessments, greenhouse gas (GHG) inventories and carbon footprinting, carbon credit and offset project development, climate adaptation and mitigation strategies, ESG advisory and reporting.
benefits: Access carbon markets and climate finance

faq.question: What is a carbon footprint?
faq.answer: It's the total greenhouse gas emissions caused directly and indirectly by your activities, expressed as carbon dioxide equivalent.

faq.question: Can you help with carbon credits?
faq.answer: Yes, we identify, develop, and facilitate carbon credit projects in various sectors.

fields.seo_title: Climate Change & Sustainability Consultancy | FeeVert Tanzania
fields.seo_description: Climate change and sustainability consultancy services. Carbon footprinting, GHG inventories, climate risk assessment, and ESG advisory in Tanzania.

fields.name: Environmental Data Management & GIS Services
fields.description: Geographic Information Systems (GIS) mapping, remote sensing and environmental data analysis, environmental database development, monitoring dashboards and reporting systems.

faq.question: What GIS software do you use?
faq.answer: We use industry-standard tools including ArcGIS, QGIS, and Google Earth Engine.

faq.question: Can you create interactive web maps?
faq.answer: Yes, we develop web-based GIS dashboards for real-time environmental monitoring.

fields.seo_title: Environmental GIS & Data Management Services | FeeVert Tanzania
fields.seo_description: GIS mapping, remote sensing, and environmental data management services in Tanzania. Spatial analysis, database development, and monitoring dashboards.

fields.name: OHS Compliance & Legal Advisory
fields.description: Interpretation and implementation of national OHS laws and regulations (OSHA), workplace registration and compliance support, development of compliance checklists and legal registers, representation during inspections and audits.
benefits: Reduced risk of penalties and fines

faq.question: Is workplace registration mandatory?
faq.answer: Yes, all workplaces in Tanzania must be registered with OSHA under the OHS Act.

faq.question: How often do regulations change?
faq.answer: Regulations are updated periodically. We keep clients informed of changes and help them adapt.

fields.seo_title: OHS Compliance & Legal Advisory Services | FeeVert Tanzania
fields.seo_description: Expert OHS compliance and legal advisory services in Tanzania. OSHA workplace registration, compliance checklists, legal registers, and inspection support.

fields.name: Workplace Risk Assessment & Hazard Identification
fields.description: Comprehensive workplace risk assessments (HIRA), Job Safety Analysis (JSA), hazard identification (physical, chemical, biological, ergonomic, psychosocial), risk control planning using hierarchy of controls.
benefits: Identify workplace hazards before incidents occur

faq.question: How often should risk assessments be done?
faq.answer: Risk assessments should be reviewed at least annually, and whenever there are changes in processes, equipment, or personnel.

faq.question: What is the hierarchy of controls?
faq.answer: It's a system for controlling risks: Elimination > Substitution > Engineering > Administrative > PPE.

fields.seo_title: Workplace Risk Assessment & Hazard Identification | FeeVert Tanzania
fields.seo_description: Professional workplace risk assessment and hazard identification services. HIRA, JSA, and risk control planning for safer workplaces in Tanzania.

fields.name: Occupational Health & Safety Audits
fields.description: Internal and external OHS audits, compliance audits against national laws and international standards (ISO 45001), gap analysis and corrective action planning, pre-certification and surveillance audits.

faq.question: What is ISO 45001?
faq.answer: It's the international standard for Occupational Health and Safety Management Systems, replacing OHSAS 18001.

faq.question: How long does an OHS audit take?
faq.answer: Depending on organization size, a full OHS audit takes 3-10 days on-site plus reporting time.

fields.seo_title: Occupational Health & Safety Audit Services | FeeVert Tanzania
fields.seo_description: Comprehensive OHS audit services in Tanzania. ISO 45001 gap analysis, compliance audits, and corrective action planning for workplace safety.

fields.name: OHS Training & Capacity Building
fields.description: Occupational safety training programs: general workplace safety, fire safety and emergency response, first aid and CPR, working at heights, confined space entry, electrical safety. Toolbox talks and on-site coaching.

faq.question: Do you provide certificates?
faq.answer: Yes, participants receive certificates of completion recognized by OSHA.

faq.question: Can training be done at our site?
faq.answer: Yes, we conduct both on-site and off-site training programs.

fields.seo_title: OHS Training & Capacity Building Programs | FeeVert Tanzania
fields.seo_description: Certified occupational health and safety training programs in Tanzania. Fire safety, first aid, working at heights, confined space, and electrical safety.

fields.name: Incident Investigation & Reporting
fields.description: Investigation of workplace accidents and near-misses, root cause analysis (RCA), preparation of incident reports and corrective actions, support in legal and insurance documentation.
benefits: Identify true root causes of incidents
Prevent recurrence through effective corrective actions

faq.question: How soon should an incident be investigated?
faq.answer: As soon as possible, ideally within 24 hours, while evidence is fresh and witnesses are available.

faq.question: Do you provide legal support?
faq.answer: We provide technical investigation reports that can support legal and insurance processes.

fields.seo_title: Workplace Incident Investigation & Reporting | FeeVert Tanzania
fields.seo_description: Professional workplace incident investigation and reporting services. Root cause analysis, corrective actions, and legal documentation support in Tanzania.
